description:
Open EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. First, create a new facility named 'Zephyr Plains Wind Farm' located in Sweetwater, TX. Then, navigate to the Chemicals section and add the following three chemicals:

1. Electrical Insulating Oil
- CAS Number: 64742-53-6
- EHS: No
- Physical State: Liquid
- Health Hazards: Aspiration Hazard
- Maximum Daily Amount: 444,000 lbs
- Average Daily Amount: 444,000 lbs
- Days On Site: 365
- Storage Location 1: Type: Transformer, Temp: Ambient, Pressure: Ambient, Description: Turbine Pad Transformers (75 units site-wide)
- Storage Location 2: Type: Transformer, Temp: Ambient, Pressure: Ambient, Description: Main Substation Step-Up Transformer

2. Sulfur Hexafluoride (SF6)
- CAS Number: 2551-62-4
- EHS: No
- Physical State: Gas
- Physical Hazards: Gas under pressure
- Health Hazards: Simple Asphyxiant
- Maximum Daily Amount: 750 lbs
- Average Daily Amount: 750 lbs
- Days On Site: 365
- Storage Location: Type: Cylinder, Temp: Ambient, Pressure: Above ambient, Description: Substation High-Voltage Circuit Breakers

3. Diesel Fuel
- CAS Number: 68476-34-6
- EHS: No
- Physical State: Liquid
- Physical Hazards: Flammable
- Health Hazards: Acute toxicity, Skin corrosion, Carcinogenicity, Specific target organ toxicity, Aspiration hazard
- Maximum Daily Amount: 3,550 lbs
- Average Daily Amount: 3,100 lbs
- Days On Site: 365
- Storage Location: Type: Tank (above ground), Temp: Ambient, Pressure: Ambient, Description: Substation Emergency Generator Belly Tank

When finished, use File > Create Submission (or Export) to save the final submission file to exactly: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Zephyr_2025_Submission.t2s
